# PlaceListMapTemplate

::: warning Experimental
Import from `react-native-automotive/experimental`. Inherited from `birkir/react-native-carplay`, not in the v1 roster, kept for migration ergonomics. May be promoted to stable in a future major.
:::

**Android-only.** Map view with a list of places displayed alongside. Similar to `PointOfInterestTemplate` but with Android-specific options.

```ts
import { PlaceListMapTemplate } from 'react-native-automotive/experimental';
```

## Source

[`packages/core/src/experimental/PlaceListMapTemplate.ts`](https://github.com/dotommy/react-native-automotive/blob/master/packages/core/src/experimental/PlaceListMapTemplate.ts)
